finding_results.notes: Aligned the opening to an explicit Tuesday frame and preserved a coherent October 6 (Tuesday) to October 7 (Wednesday) progression in the repayment sequence.
Kept the no-drink choice but removed clean closure by adding near-relapse ideation, ongoing physiological agitation, and recurring night craving after bottle destruction.
Made both support vectors conditional: added uncertainty to extra hours and to the Reno lead, with explicit upfront cash costs that keep repayment momentum operationally at risk.
Preserved all legal/account date and account details while replacing repeated facts/proof phrasing with varied diction and an embodied interruption beat in Nora's voicemail cadence.

summary: Implemented a structural/craft pass that resolves all packet findings: timeline continuity is explicit, addiction risk remains active after refusal, repayment momentum now includes immediate action with concrete cost, rescue vectors stay conditional, and repeated rhetorical templates were replaced with voice-distinct, embodied alternatives.
